meta_title: For Founders: user onboarding to Solve no project ideas (Beginner Comparison)
meta_description: Learn how to user onboarding and overcome no project ideas. A Beginner-level Comparison using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: User Onboarding to Solve No Project Ideas
content.seo_description: Learn how to build high-converting user onboarding to overcome no project ideas. A beginner-level guide using Antigravity and Claude Code for SaaS founders.
content.answer_block: Stop searching for the 'perfect' idea and start building a high-impact onboarding flow. By solving the friction of first-time user experience, you create immediate value for potential customers. Focus on a single, clear outcome that turns a visitor into a paid user within seconds of their first login.
content.intro:
The blinking cursor of an empty project file is the graveyard of a thousand SaaS dreams. You are paralyzed not by a lack of ability, but by the absence of a validated problem. Every day spent waiting for a 'perfect' market insight is revenue left on the table.

But here is the engineering truth: your first product doesn't need to be a revolution; it needs to be a bridge. By focusing on a frictionless user onboarding flow, you stop building features in a vacuum and start building a system that captures, converts, and retains. Let's turn that 'no project' paralysis into a functioning revenue engine.

steps.title: Define the Value Anchor
steps.description: Identify the one task your app completes that justifies a user's time. We focus on this single 'Aha!' moment to drive the onboarding logic.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a schema for a SaaS onboarding flow that focuses on a single 'Aha!' moment. Include fields for user sign-up, email verification, and a redirect to a demo dashboard.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Generate a Next.js component for a user onboarding progress bar.'

steps.title: Build the Minimalist Sign-up
steps.description: Remove all friction. Use social auth or magic links to ensure the barrier to entry is near zero.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a secure authentication boilerplate using NextAuth.js with Google and Email providers.

steps.title: Implement the 'Aha!' Interactive Tour
steps.description: Guide the user directly to the core functionality. Don't show them settings; show them the value.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a React modal component that acts as a guided tour for a new SaaS user, highlighting the main dashboard button.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Create a Shepherd.js or Intro.js integration for my dashboard.'

steps.title: Add Conversion Hooks
steps.description: Place 'Upgrade to Pro' prompts exactly where the user realizes the value of your automated tool.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Design a pricing table component with a clear CTA for a 'Pro' tier, including a mock Stripe checkout button.

steps.title: Automate Onboarding Emails
steps.description: If they drop off, bring them back. Configure an automated lifecycle email sequence.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a Resend API integration script to send a welcome email immediately after user registration.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Configure Resend API to trigger a welcome email on new user sign-up.'

pro_tips: Never ask for a credit card during onboarding; focus on product-led growth (PLG) by proving value first.
Use a 'Progress Bar' with at least 25% completion already filled to trigger the Zeigarnik effect.
Always A/B test your CTA button color; high-contrast colors consistently outperform muted tones in SaaS.
Track onboarding drop-off points using PostHog to see exactly where users get confused.
Keep your onboarding under 60 seconds; if it takes longer, you are building a process, not a product.
content.next_steps: Deploy your MVP to Vercel, share the link in our community Slack to get your first 10 beta testers, and iterate based on their feedback.
content.conversion_block: You now have the technical blueprint to stop theorizing and start executing. The market doesn't care about your perfect plan; it cares about the value you deliver today. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
